notes: CONFIG.json and CONFIG.md must be read together
They are complementary and have no priority relationship

sections.title: Filename
sections.description: Controls naming behavior for generated files

sections.title: Structure
sections.description: Controls directory constraints and locale sync

sections.title: Title Generation
sections.description: Controls default generation behavior for document titles

sections.title: Connections
sections.description: Controls index/detail contract for relationship data

sections.title: Profile Minimal Set
sections.description: Defines the core file set for Profile

filename.emojiPrefixDefault.label: Default Emoji Prefix
filename.emojiPrefixDefault.description: Whether newly generated filenames should default to emoji prefix

filename.allowEmojiPrefix.label: Allow Emoji Prefix
filename.allowEmojiPrefix.description: Whether filenames are allowed to include emoji prefix

filename.exampleSuffixSingle.label: Single Example Suffix
filename.exampleSuffixSingle.description: Filename suffix for single example files, default _example

filename.exampleSuffixCollection.label: Example Collection Suffix
filename.exampleSuffixCollection.description: Directory suffix for example collections, default _examples

structure.requireFirstLevelReadme.label: Require First-Level README
structure.requireFirstLevelReadme.description: Each first-level directory under root must include README.md

structure.recommendFirstLevelInstruction.label: Recommend First-Level INSTRUCTION
structure.recommendFirstLevelInstruction.description: Whether first-level directories are recommended to include local INSTRUCTION.md

structure.syncEnAndZhStructure.label: Sync EN/ZH Structure
structure.syncEnAndZhStructure.description: Whether template/en and template/zh structures must stay isomorphic

document.title.emojiEnabled.label: Emoji in Title
document.title.emojiEnabled.description: Whether generated titles allow emoji by default

document.title.defaultHeadingLevel.label: Default Heading Level
document.title.defaultHeadingLevel.description: Default Markdown heading level for generated titles

connections.requireRootCsv.label: Require Root CSV
connections.requireRootCsv.description: Connections root directory must keep an index CSV

connections.rootCsvName.label: Root CSV Name
connections.rootCsvName.description: Filename of the official Connections index CSV

connections.examplesCsvName.label: Examples CSV Name
connections.examplesCsvName.description: Filename of the Connections examples index CSV

connections.onePersonOneMarkdown.label: One Person One Markdown
connections.onePersonOneMarkdown.description: Each person must map to an individual markdown detail file

profile.minimalFiles.label: Profile Minimal Files
profile.minimalFiles.description: Core file list recommended for Profile
